ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
Language: php
🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LibreBooking/librebooking
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibreBooking/librebooking
Language: php
LibreBooking is an open-source resource scheduling solution. It provides a flexible, mobile-friendly, and extensible interface for organizations to manage resource reservations. The "develop" branch contains the latest code of the project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrestaShop/PrestaShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop
Language: php
PrestaShop is the universal open-source software platform to build your e-commerce solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alextselegidis/easyappointments
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alextselegidis/easyappointments
Language: php
📅 Easy!Appointments - Self Hosted Appointment Scheduler

ns0:entry.ns0:title: api-platform/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/api-platform/core
Language: php
The server component of API Platform: hypermedia and GraphQL APIs in minutes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: digininja/DVWA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/digininja/DVWA
Language: php
Damn Vulnerable Web Application (DVWA)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elabftw/elabftw
Language: php
📓 eLabFTW is the most popular open source electronic lab notebook for research labs.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kanboard/kanboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: php
Kanban project management software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: monicahq/monica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/monicahq/monica
Language: php
Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/groupfolders
Language: php
📁👩‍👩‍👧‍👦 Admin-configured folders shared by everyone in a group or team. https://github.com/nextcloud-releases/groupfolders
